exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.note: Hit 12 on last set again — second session in a row. Ready to bump to 62.5 next time.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.note: Last rep was absolute limit — couldn't have done one more. Right weight for now until shoulder is healthier.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: Tough last reps but manageable. Hold at 135 and push for cleaner reps.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: Machine goes 120 to 135. Stayed at 120 — last rep tough. Stay here until it feels cleaner before jumping to 135.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Dropped to 12.5 lb — left shoulder was tired. Got all 15 reps each set. Shoulder felt OK, just fatigued.

exercises.name: Arms Circuit: Incline DB Curl + Rope Pushdown + Face Pull
exercises.note: Incline curl: 10, 12, 12 — bump to 22.5 next session. Rope pushdown 80 lb x 12 x 3, solid. Face pulls 40 lb x 15 x 3, clean.
exercises.planned: Incline curl 20 lb / Rope pushdown 80 lb / Face pull 40 lb

exercises.name: Core Circuit: Pallof Press + Dead Bugs + Side Plank
exercises.note: Pallof at 40 lb confirmed again for 12 reps each side. Dead bugs 12/side. Side plank 30s.
exercises.planned: Pallof 40 lb x 12/side + Dead bugs x 12/side + Side plank 30s x 2 rounds

notes: Strong session overall. Left shoulder still a little tired on lateral raises — dropped to 12.5 lb. Flat bench got 12 on last set again. Arm circuit felt good.
